importers.notes: The USA is a significant importer of neodymium iron boron magnets, with many applications in the electric motor and renewable energy industries.
China is also a significant importer of neodymium iron boron magnets, with many applications in the consumer electronics and industrial equipment industries.
Japan is a significant importer of neodymium iron boron magnets, with many applications in the consumer electronics and automotive industries.
South Korea is a smaller but still significant importer of neodymium iron boron magnets, with many applications in the consumer electronics and industrial equipment industries.
Other countries, including the EU, India, and Southeast Asia, also import neodymium iron boron magnets, but to a lesser extent.
